articles.author: Katherine Doherty
articles.title: BofA Stock Traders Notch Record Fueled by Momentum in Markets - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Bank of America Corp.’s traders pulled in the business’s highest quarterly revenue in more than a decade, riding a wave of volatility that pushed the firm’s stock-trading desk to an all-time record.
articles.content:
